Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: containers for smoking and tobacco use [300198649], containers for personal use [300198399], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: cases (containers) [300045659], containers by form [300194507], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Flat, usually rectangular containers similar to but smaller than cigar cases, used to carry cigarettes. For covered boxes used as containers for cigarettes and meant to be placed on a table, desk, or the like, use "cigarette boxes."

Estuches planos, generalmente rectangulares, similares pero más pequeños que los estuches de cigarros, usados para llevar cigarrillos. Para cajas cubiertas usadas para guardar cigarrillos y que se colocan sobre una mesa, escritorio u otro lugar similar, use "pitillera".

Platte, meestal rechthoekige omhulsels die worden gebruikt om sigaretten in mee te dragen, lijkend op sigarendoosjes maar dan kleiner. Gebruik 'sigarettendozen' voor de doosjes met sigaretten met deksel die op tafel, bureau of iets dergelijks gezet worden.
平坦且常為矩形的容器，與雪茄匣盒形似，但體積較小，用於攜帶香菸。若要指放置於餐桌、書桌等地方的附蓋香菸容器，就用「香菸盒」這個詞。

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
